summary.intent: Push a formatting fix for providers.js and cut a new versioned release (20260328.03).
summary.outcome: Commit 880a6686 was pushed to main and a new release was prepared by running the prepare script, updating CHANGELOG.md and website/changelog/index.html.

repo: Releases follow a date-based versioning scheme: YYYYMMDD.NN (e.g. 20260328.02, 20260328.03).
A prepare/release script handles auto-versioning and updates CHANGELOG.md and website/changelog/index.html automatically.

code.finding: Had a formatting issue that was fixed and pushed in commit 880a6686.
Updated as part of the release prep script, not manually.
Kept in sync with CHANGELOG.md via the release prepare script.

workflow: Release preparation is automated via a prepare script that handles versioning, changelog updates, and commit.
Checking existing release tags before cutting a new release is part of the standard workflow.
